# TheLVAthletics.com - Independent Editorial Coverage

## About
Premium editorial coverage of the Las Vegas Athletics. Independent journalism covering roster moves, front office decisions, stadium development, and the Oakland-to-Vegas transition. No corporate spin.

## Site
- Homepage: https://thelvathletics.com
- Blog: https://thelvathletics.com/blog
- Editorial focus: roster analysis, stadium updates, ownership coverage

## Coverage Areas
- Las Vegas Athletics roster construction and prospects
- Stadium construction and business coverage
- John Fisher ownership analysis
- Oakland relocation aftermath
- Sacramento transition period analysis
- Fan community and season ticket coverage

## Writing Style
Serious journalism tone similar to The Athletic. Investigative pieces, data-driven analysis, insider coverage.
